name: BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers
notes: Edit this BB to include your PCI DSS Servers by IP address.  You must then apply this BB to rules related to failed logins, remote access, etc.
bb_references: BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers on events which are detected by the undefined system
conditions_text: where either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
TD_list: APPLY BB:ComplianceDefinition: PCI DSS Servers on events which are detected by the undefined system
AND where either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
